---
title: "Projects"
page-layout: full
---

## Repository Directory

Use this page as the main index of your projects and published outputs.

::: {.project-grid}
::: {.project-card}
### GSEA Permutation vs. Rotation

Simulation comparing permutation and rotation methods for GSEA under a null association setting.

::: {.meta-line}
`R` `Quarto` `Simulation`
:::

::: {.link-row}
[Repository](https://github.com/mirramockakid/GSEA-Permutation-vs.-Rotation){.chip-link}
[Analysis HTML](https://mirramockakid.github.io/GSEA-Permutation-vs.-Rotation/rotations_walkthrough.html){.chip-link}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card .project-card-muted}
### Next Project

Add another repository summary here with one sentence describing the goal and key output.

::: {.link-row}
[Repository](https://github.com/mirramockakid){.chip-link}
:::
:::
:::
